name: Green Rice- Weight Watchers
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine rice and melted margarine.
2. Add onions, cheese, celery, broccoli (frozen), and soup to the mixture.
3. Stir until everything is well combined.
4. Place in a 2-quart casserole dish.
5. Bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 1 hour or until the rice is cooked. Cover while baking.
Makes 8 servings:
1 bread
3/4 fat
1 protein
1 vegetable
15 optional calories
210 calories/serving
